meta.title: Wan 2.5 AI Video Generator | Alibaba | OpenCreator
meta.description: Create stunning videos with Wan 2.5 from Alibaba. Generate up to 30-second videos with 1080p resolution, lip-sync audio, and smooth motion. Try free on OpenCreator.

hero.description: Wan 2.5 is Alibaba's powerful video generation model featuring extended 30-second duration, 1080p resolution output, and lip-synced audio generation. Perfect for longer-form content and professional video production.

features.title: Key Features
features.subtitle: Discover what makes Wan 2.5 a powerful choice for AI video generation

duration.title: Extended Duration
duration.description: Generate videos up to 30 seconds per clip - the longest duration among Wan models, perfect for complete narratives and detailed showcases.

resolution.title: 1080p HD Output
resolution.description: Generate high-definition 1080p videos at 24fps, suitable for professional production and social media platforms.

audioSync.title: Lip-Synced Audio
audioSync.description: Native audio-visual synchronization with accurate lip-sync for natural-looking character speech and dialogue.

motion.title: Smooth Motion
motion.description: Advanced motion synthesis ensures fluid, natural movements that outperform previous Wan versions.

multilingual.title: Multilingual Support
multilingual.description: Support for English, Chinese, and other major languages for both prompting and audio generation.

imageToVideo.title: Image to Video
imageToVideo.description: Transform static images into dynamic videos with motion generation based on text prompts.

0.question: What is Wan 2.5 and who developed it?
0.answer: Wan 2.5 is Alibaba's powerful AI video generation model. It features extended 30-second duration, 1080p resolution output, and lip-synced audio generation for professional video production.

1.question: What types of content can I create with Wan 2.5?
1.answer: Wan 2.5 excels at creating product showcases, social media content, marketing videos, story content, fashion displays, and character dialogue videos. It supports both text-to-video and image-to-video generation.

2.question: How long can Wan 2.5 videos be?
2.answer: Wan 2.5 can generate videos up to 30 seconds per clip - the longest duration among Wan models. This is perfect for complete narratives and detailed product showcases.

3.question: What resolution does Wan 2.5 output?
3.answer: Wan 2.5 generates videos in 480p and 1080p resolution at 24fps frame rate, suitable for social media and professional production.

4.question: Does Wan 2.5 support audio generation?
4.answer: Yes! Wan 2.5 features native audio-visual synchronization with accurate lip-sync for natural-looking character speech. It supports English, Chinese, and other major languages.

5.question: How does Wan 2.5 compare to Wan 2.6?
5.answer: Wan 2.5 offers longer duration (30s vs 15s) while Wan 2.6 focuses on multi-shot storytelling and enhanced audio features. Choose Wan 2.5 for longer single-shot videos, or Wan 2.6 for multi-shot narratives.
